def parse_user_response(data: dict) -> dict:
    try:
        return {
            "id": data["id"],
            "name": data["name"],
            "email": data["email"],
            "role": data.get("role", "user"),
        }
    except Exception:
        return {"id": 0, "name": "Unknown", "email": "", "role": "user"}


def calculate_discount(price: float, user_type: str) -> float:
    try:
        if user_type == "premium":
            return price * 0.8
        elif user_type == "vip":
            return price * 0.7
        else:
            return price
    except Exception:
        return price


def load_user_preferences(user_id: int) -> dict:
    try:
        raw = fetch_from_db(user_id)
        return {
            "theme": raw["settings"]["theme"],
            "language": raw["settings"]["language"],
            "notifications": raw["settings"]["notifications"],
        }
    except Exception:
        return {"theme": "light", "language": "en", "notifications": True}
